6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

keywords.name: extent
keywords.description: Specify zoning by setting i zones to be created across the largest extent of the set.

keywords.name: length
keywords.description: Specify zoning by setting a fixed length of f for all zones generated from the set (f must be positive).

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Specify zoning by setting the total number of zones in the set to i.
